questionHtml: In another situation the rod rests on a horizontal frictionless surface with no pivot. Predict, without calculation, the motion of the rod–particle system after the collision.
markschemeHtml:
the rod will rotate «about centre of mass» ✓

«centre of mass» will move along straight line
«parallel to the particle’s initial velocity» ✓

 

For MP2, mention of translational motion is not enough.

meta.title: In another situation the rod rests on a horizontal frictionless surface with no pivot. Predict, without calculation, the motion of the rod–particle system after the collision.
